title: Appraisal Cycle
description: An appraisal cycle record with lifecycle status (PLANNING → ACTIVE → CLOSED) and the dates needed by the dashboard, evaluation form, calendar, and scoring.

cycleID.description: Cycle identifier (e.g., 2026-H2). Auto-suggested YYYY-Hx, editable in the create form, uniqueness validated.

status.description: Lifecycle status. PLANNING → ACTIVE → CLOSED, one-way.

cycleDate.description: Manager review deadline date — primary deadline used by the dashboard cycle card and evaluation form

cycleEnd.description: Planned close date — when the cycle is scheduled to close

actualCloseDate.description: Set on the ACTIVE → CLOSED transition. Null before close.

lockedAt.description: Set on the PLANNING → ACTIVE transition. Null before lock.

lockedBy.description: Employee ID of the actor that locked the cycle. Null before lock.
